2022 was the sixth year in the history of Legacy Fighting Alliance, a mixed martial arts promotion based in the United States.[1]

List of events

[edit]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 121: Brown vs. Jones

[edit]
Legacy Fighting Alliance 121: Brown vs. Jones
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 14, 2022
VenueThe Bomb Factory
CityDallas, Texas, U.S.
Event chronology
Legacy Fighting Alliance 120: Cantuária vs. Horth Legacy Fighting Alliance 121: Brown vs. Jones

Legacy Fighting Alliance 121: Brown vs. Jones was the hundredth-eleventh event of Legacy Fighting Alliance and took place on January 14, 2022. It aired on UFC Fight Pass.

Background

[edit]

LFA 121 will also be the celebratory event of the promotion's fifth anniversary and will be headlined by Aaron McKenzie vs Joshua Jones Lightweight bout.[2][3]

The co-main event of Legacy Fighting Alliance 121st event will feature Elijah Johns vs Brandon Phillips Featherweight bout.[4]

Results

[edit]
Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Welterweight Chris Brown def. Steve Jones TKO (punches) 3 1:04 [a]
Featherweight Elijah Johns def. Brandon Phillips Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00 [b]
Bantamweight Michael Cyr def. Alden Coria Submission (rear-naked choke) 3 3:20
Bantamweight Isaiah Gutierrez def. Keeton Gorton Submission (guillotine choke) 2 1:28
Featherweight Anvar Boynazarov def. John Pham KO (knee and punches) 1 0:21
Heavyweight Jakori Savage def. Siteu Senghor TKO (punches and elbows) 1 3:53
Preliminary Card
Middleweight Zumar Archer def. Akeem Lewis KO (punches) 1 4:10
Welterweight Caleb Jensen def. Harrison Layne TKO (punches) 1 0:51
  1. ^ Brown missed weight (174 lbs)
  2. ^ Johns missed weight (150.4 lbs)

Legacy Fighting Alliance 124: Formiga vs. Bunes is a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance and will take place on February 11, 2022.[6] It aired on UFC Fight Pass.

Background

[edit]

The event was headliner by a bantamweight bout between Jussier Formiga and Felipe Bunes. The bout was originally scheduled as a flyweight bout, but was bumped up to bantamweight after Formiga missed weight.[8]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 126: Bilharinho vs. Delano

[edit]
Legacy Fighting Alliance 126: Bilharinho vs. Delano
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateMarch 11, 2022
VenueComplexo Ribalta
CityRio de Janeiro, Brazil

Legacy Fighting Alliance 126: Bilharinho vs. Delano is a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance and will take place on March 11, 2022. It aired on UFC Fight Pass.

Background

[edit]

An LFA Featherweight Championship bout for the vacant title between Jonas Bilharinho and Rafael Barbosa was scheduled as the event headliner.[10] Barbosa was later pulled from the bout, after pre-fight exams detected two brain aneurysms.[11]

Results

[edit]
Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight José Delano def. Jonas Bilharinho Decision (unanimous) 5 5:00 [a]
Welterweight Gabriel Bonfim def. Eduardo Garvon Submission (arm-triangle choke) 1 1:19 [b]
Lightweight Ismael Bonfim def. Andrey Augusto Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00 [c]
Heavyweight Eduardo Neves def. André Vieira KO (punches) 1 1:04
Women's Bantamweight Tamires Vidal def. Queila Braga Submission (heel hook) 2 3:36
Light Heavyweight Rodolfo Bellato def. Thiago Vieira Submission (triangle choke) 1 4:58
Featherweight Gabriel Alves Braga def. Rogerio Ferreira Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Preliminary Card
Flyweight Mateus Brauns def. Inaildo Santos TKO (punches) 1 2:10
Middleweight Lucas Fernando def. Rodrigo Lima Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Welterweight Gabriel Costa def. Vandirson Alves Decision (majority) 3 5:00 [d]
Flyweight Lincon Santos def. Marciano Ferreira Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 2:24
Heavyweight Hyago Silva def. Matusalém dos Santos Decision (split) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the vacant LFA Featherweight Championship. Delano missed weight (147 lbs); Only Bilharinho eligible to win title.
  2. ^ For the vacant LFA Welterweight Championship. Garvon missed weight (175.8 lbs); Only Bonfim eligible to win title.
  3. ^ Andrey Augusto missed weight (159.6 lbs)
  4. ^ Vandirson Alves missed weight (172.6 lbs)
